title: Glowing Blocks and Ores
description: This Pack adds Emissive textures to blocks and compatible with both Optifine and continuity
body:
This pack requires **Continuity** Or  **Optifine**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# **[Download Continuity Here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)**
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
## **Glowing Blocks is a Pack that adds emmisive textures to blocks in minecraft!**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# The Blocks The Have a Emmisive Texture as of version 0.1.7!

(the some varients of the blocks are not encluded)

![ATB](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/13f68d82460d779d163eb9d9a7f86d79cccf0bdb.png)
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
- **Continuity** is required (only if you dont have optifine) after version Alpha **0.0.3**
- **Polytone** is required Below version **0.1.5**, it is no longer required in the pack after **0.1.5**

----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
**More Updates may come in the future ...**

### | **Curseforge project -**
> [![curseforge](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/088a40aa7f4cb403f7bc2a97cd9eda03f0356564.png)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/glowing-stuff)
